hero.bio: Multidisciplinary developer and designer based in Alicante, Spain. I build digital products where code and design work together.

home.about_bio: 7+ years in graphic design and branding, 4+ years as a UX/UI Designer, now combining both with frontend and full-stack development.

projects.heading: Selected
projects.subheading: Development, UX/UI, and branding projects across various industries.

about.heading: About
about.p1: Hi! I'm Abraham Pérez, a multidisciplinary UX/UI Designer and Web Developer based in Alicante, Spain.
about.p2: I hold official qualifications in Graphic Design, Web Application Development and Multiplatform Application Development — three regulated degrees that cover the full cycle from visual identity to digital product.
about.p3: Over time, I shifted my focus towards web design and UX, and for the past 4 years I've been working professionally as a UX/UI Designer, designing user-centered interfaces and digital products.
about.p4: For the past year and a half I've been actively working in development, building real mobile and web applications that combine my design background with frontend and full-stack development.
about.p5: I also run a small app lab where I experiment with my own ideas: Ab-Lab. It's the space where projects like the ones you can see on this site are born.

project_detail.github_private_body: Unfortunately this GitHub project is private. If you'd like to request access, feel free to reach out via email.

project_content.licencia-premium:
Licencia de Armas is a mobile application developed with React Native, available for Android and iOS.

The app helps users prepare for the official firearms license exam in Spain through categorized practice tests, detailed results, and progress tracking.

The project has two versions:

· Premium — Full access to the complete question bank, advanced statistics, and unlimited practice. Available on both Android and iOS.

· Freemium — Android-only version with a core set of free tests and optional in-app purchases to unlock the full content.

The interface is designed for non-technical users, prioritizing clarity, accessibility, and a smooth experience across both platforms.
project_content.contabilidad-domestica:
Contabilidad Doméstica is a Flutter mobile app for managing personal and household finances in a simple, privacy-first way. Available on Android and coming soon to iOS — completely free with ads.

It lets you log expenses and income in seconds, with over 42 spending categories and 3 income categories included. Each transaction supports an amount, category, date and optional note.

Key features include monthly budgets with proximity alerts, visual trend charts and category breakdowns, PDF report generation for data export, optional cloud sync via Google or Apple account, and full offline functionality.

Data is stored locally on the device by default. Cloud sync is encrypted and only activated when the user chooses to enable it.
project_content.midosis:
MiDosis is an Android application developed in native Kotlin that helps manage medication for the whole family — people and pets — from a single app.

It allows creating independent profiles for each household member: people, dogs, cats and other animals. Each profile has its own treatments, doses and reminders, fully separated.

Key features include smart reminders that notify at the exact time of each dose, a digital medicine cabinet to track medication inventory and know when to restock, a calendar view of active treatments with a complete dose history, and a visual tracking dashboard to see at a glance which doses are pending, completed or missed.

Free to download on Google Play.
project_content.examen-test-pnb:
Examen Test PNB is a Flutter mobile app designed to help you prepare for the official PNB (Patrón de Navegación Básica) nautical licence exam in Spain. Available on Android and iOS — free with ads, with an optional one-time Premium upgrade.

The app includes over 400 questions from the official exam bank, organised across the 7 syllabus topics. Features include unlimited practice tests, interactive flashcards for buoyage, COLREGS signals and nautical terminology, a fully illustrated study guide with images and diagrams, a real exam simulator with 40 random questions and a timer, error tracking to identify weak areas, and full offline functionality.

The free version covers all content with ads. The Premium plan (€5.99, one-time payment) removes ads and includes lifetime access with future updates.

Built with Flutter to deliver a smooth, native experience on both platforms.
